BeezShield Overview
BeezShield is the umbrella brand for machine trust infrastructure. Sentinel Alpha is the live product agent that provides execution fidelity decisions before autonomous systems execute on-chain.

Sentinel Alpha Description
Sentinel Alpha is a Base-native risk intelligence API for LLM agents, bot builders, and x402 buyers. It returns machine-readable outputs for pre-execution policy decisions.

Live Website
https://beezshield.com

Live API
https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score

ERC-8004 Profile
https://8004scan.io/agents/base/45967

GitHub
https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha

Risk Intelligence
Sentinel Alpha publishes public, machine-readable risk intelligence artifacts and demo feed examples. Demo feed content is illustrative unless a live scanner is enabled.

x402 Pricing Lanes (USDC)
- basic: 0.02
- executive: 0.05
- premium: 0.10
- priority: 0.15

Example curl
curl -X POST "https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "X-SENTINEL-LANE: basic" \
  -H "X402-PAYMENT: tx:0xYOUR_TRANSACTION_HASH" \
  -d '{"contract_address":"0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111","chain":"base","context":{}}'
